member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Web.Controllers.Api.StoreModuleController.GetStoreByOuterId(System.String,System.String)
member.remarks: Gets store by outer id (integration key) with full information loaded

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Web.Controllers.Api.StoreModuleController.DeleteStore(System.String[])
member.param: Ids of store that needed to delete

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Web.Controllers.Api.StoreModuleController.SendDynamicNotificationToStoreEmail(VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Web.Model.SendDynamicNotificationRequest)
member.summary: Send dynamic notification (contains custom list of properties) to store or administrator email

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Web.Controllers.Api.StoreModuleController.GetLoginOnBehalfInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if given contact has login on behalf permission

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Web.Controllers.Api.StoreModuleController.GetUserAllowedStores(System.String)
member.summary: Returns list of stores which user can sign in

member.summary: Partial update for the specified store by id

member.summary: Represent result for checking of possibility login on behalf request
